Class Dice

java.lang.Object
com.cluegame.model.Dice
public class Dice extends Object
Represents a pair of fair six-sided dice. Each die has an equal probability of landing on any face (1-6).
Author:
Thanh Shaw

      public Dice()
      Constructs a new Dice object with a random seed.

  • Method Details

    • roll

      public int roll()
      Rolls both dice and returns the total.
      Returns:
      a random integer between 2 and 12 inclusive

    • rollSingle

      public int rollSingle()
      Rolls a single die and returns the result.
      Returns:
      a random integer between 1 and 6 inclusive
